methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series G → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.25x) to $500M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Robotics & Manufacturing (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 11 same-sector peers exist in Robotics & Manufacturing, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Wandelbots is a Series G robotics and manufacturing automation company that has raised $126M to date. The comparable universe in Robotics & Manufacturing comprises one public company (277810.KQ) and eight private peers including 1X Technologies, Divergent, Exotec, Locus Robotics, and Bedrock Robotics. However, the peer set lacks sufficient same-stage or valuation-tier overlap to support a reliable peer-median approach—only one adjacent-stage comparable was identified, falling short of the three-datapoint threshold required for robust triangulation.

Given this constraint, valuation relies on stage-progression methodology. Using total capital raised ($126M) as a baseline proxy anchored to $500M, a typical Series G step-up multiplier of 1.25x yields an implied valuation of $625M. This method assumes progression dynamics consistent with frontier-tech financing patterns at this maturity stage.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $531M to $719M, with a median of $625M. The width of this range (±15% around median) reflects reliance on a single methodology rather than methodological triangulation. Key uncertainties include (1) revenue and unit economics relative to the peer set, which remain undisclosed; (2) the relevance of the single adjacent-stage comparable; and (3) whether the total-raised proxy appropriately reflects true valuation progression. Additional disclosure of financial metrics and tighter peer comparability would substantially narrow this range.
